title: Liability of directors and officers
doc_html:
§92.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1; Acts 1984, No. 841, §1, eff. July 13, 1984; Acts 1987, No. 463, §1; Acts 1988, No. 455, §1, eff. July 10, 1988; Acts 1989, No. 612, §1, eff. July 6, 1989; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
